pages.visible: Planet Earth and the Solar System
pages.speech: Planet Earth and the Solar System

pages.visible: We live on the planet Earth.
pages.speech: We live on the planet Earth.

pages.visible: Our planet has water and land.
pages.speech: Our planet has water and land.

pages.visible: In the water, there are lots of amazing fish and sea creatures.
pages.speech: In the water, there are lots of amazing fish and sea creatures.

pages.visible: On land, we build comfortable homes, grow plants and take care of animals.
pages.speech: On land, we build comfortable homes, grow plants and take care of animals.

pages.visible: The moon travels around the earth.
pages.speech: The moon travels around the earth.

pages.visible: Brave astronauts travel to the moon in a rocket to see what they can find.
pages.speech: Brave astronauts travel to the moon in a rocket to see what they can find.

pages.visible: Earth is in the solar system.
pages.speech: Earth is in the solar system.

pages.visible: At the central part of our solar system is the sun.
pages.speech: At the central part of our solar system is the sun.

pages.visible: There are 8 planets in our solar system that all move around the sun in a big circle.
pages.speech: There are 8 planets in our solar system that all move around the sun in a big circle.

pages.visible: The planet closest to the sun is Mercury.
pages.speech: The planet closest to the sun is Mercury.

pages.visible: As the biggest planet, Jupiter is made of gas.
pages.speech: As the biggest planet, Jupiter is made of gas.

pages.visible: The planet furthest away from the sun is Neptune, feeling quite lonely in the outer reaches.
pages.speech: The planet furthest away from the sun is Neptune, feeling quite lonely in the outer reaches.
